description: The AIChatModal component is incomplete (truncated at line 109) and appears to duplicate functionality from AIAssistant.tsx. The modal has chat state management but no visible completion of the render logic. Should either complete the modal implementation or remove it in favor of the AIAssistant component.
successCriteria: Either: Complete the AIChatModal component with proper render logic and error handling
Or: Remove AIChatModal.tsx and update imports to use AIAssistant.tsx exclusively
Verify no other components import AIChatModal before removal
